text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Traceeen! Academyyy! Cheer Squad!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: We, the Tracen Cheer Squad, have<n>formed for the upcoming Spring Fan<n>Fest!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Our sworn duty: to cheer on the<n>Umamusume who will run in the<n>competition and boost everyone's<n>morale!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And to that end...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: We will be sporting a new,<n>high-performance costume! It<n>supports abdominal breathing! It even<n>has a built-in microphone!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Wh-whaaaaa?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Great surprise, isn't it? I'm<n>glad I kept it secret until the big<n>reveal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I wish you hadn't, then at least I<n>could've stopped you! And please,<n>what have you got Pearl doing?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Much like fireworks or a disco ball,<n>things that sparkle lift people's<n>spirits! Besides, isn't it glorious? It's<n>like this costume was made for Pearl.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Gooo fooor iiit. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I have no idea what's going on<n>anymore...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: WHY YOUUU! KING HALOOO! Was it<n>you who messed with the school<n>speaker settings?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: A complaint came in to the disciplinary<n>committee. The speakers suddenly<n>stopped working, then some weird<n>singing... wait, what's going on here?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Agh! I didn't think the disciplinary<n>committee would sniff us out this<n>fast! Cheer Squad! Time out!<n>Retreeeat!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh... What have I gotten myself into?<n>This is way too chaotic...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So, basically... Tracen Cheer Squad is<n>a temporary team formed in the<n>lead-up to the Spring Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Fan Fests are held twice a year, one<n>in spring and one in fall. The Spring<n>Fan Fest is a sports day, while the<n>Fall Fan Fest is a cultural day.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: In the Spring Fan Fest, students from<n>all over the academy gather to take<n>part in contests and events to<n>entertain their fans.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Every year, a Cheer Squad is formed<n>to liven up the event, and this time<n>it's King who's in charge. Joining her<n>are Pearl and I, along with the rest of<n>the squad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Right, Pearl?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: That's right! Nice one, Nature. You<n>summed everything up perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Then can you do me a favor and trynot to make things crazier thanthey already are? You know King willgo overboard if you give her thechance.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Oh? But why? I don't think her ideas<n>are bad at all. Her way of thinking is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BOOM, CHA CHA! CHIKI CHIKICHA! BOOM TA TA! CHA CHA!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ngh?! Where's all this rowdy music<n>coming from? I hope this isn't what I<n>think it is...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...you think? On the... drums...<n>whistles...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Aghhh...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on here?! Who's<n>responsible for this racket?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Later this week, we'll be performing<n>a special practice session for visitors<n>from outside the academy, so I get<n>why she's pulling out all the stops,<n>but still...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The weird costume, the live music...<n>She even made giant party crackers...<n>Ahhh, why is she making everything<n>so flashy?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Even if I asked her what she was<n>thinking, I don't think she'd give me<n>a straight answer.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I hear you'd like some answers?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Pearl?! You almost gave me a<n>heart attack...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I heard the voice of a lost child<n>and my body moved before I could<n>even think about it.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Anyway, about King. It all started one<n>month ago, as far as I know.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: It was the day that sign-ups started<n>for the Fan Fest competitions. That's<n>when King...
